label.description: Label shown on the system boundary box (e.g. System, Application Name).

actors.description: Actors outside the system boundary. Left = primary (initiate); right = secondary/systems.

id.description: Unique id; must match source/target in relationships where the participant is an actor.

placement.description: left = primary actors who initiate use cases (customer, student, admin, user). right = secondary/system actors (database, payment gateway, external API, mail service).

useCases.description: Use cases (ellipses) inside the system boundary. Each has a unique id.

id.description: Unique id; must match source/target in relationships where the participant is a use case.

label.description: Short action description (e.g. Login, View Report, Export PDF).

relationships.description: Links between actors and use cases, or between use cases. source and target are actor or use case ids.

source.description: Actor or use case id (source node).

target.description: Actor or use case id (target node).

relationship.description: communication = solid line (actor participates in use case, or optional link); include = dashed arrow with <<include>> (source includes target); extend = dashed arrow with <<extend>> (source extends target); generalization = hollow arrow (subtype points to supertype).
